case_title: KENNETH FAHY PLUMBING, INC. VS SNEED RICHARD D. DBA SNEED & COMPANY CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,465.68 FILED BY KENNETH FAHY PLUMBING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SNEED RICHARD D. DBA SNEED & COMPANY CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO APR-30-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF APR-05-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SNEED RICHARD D. DBA SNEED & COMPANY CONSTRUCTION

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $499.00 FILED BY SNEED RICHARD D. DBA SNEED & COMPANY CONSTRUCTION AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KENNETH FAHY PLUMBING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENNETH FAHY PLUMBING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SNEED RICHARD D. DBA SNEED & COMPANY CONSTRUCTION $575.51 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $611.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SNEED RICHARD D. DBA SNEED & COMPANY CONSTRUCTION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT KENNETH FAHY PLUMBING, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
LETTER FROM KENNETH FAHY PLUMBING RECEIVED AND SENT TO ANTOINNETTE YOUNG (PROTEM).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SNEED RICHARD D. DBA SNEED & COMPANY CONSTRUCTION
